environment.name: PAYMENT_ALLOWED_RETURN_ORIGINS
environment.description: Comma-separated origins allowed for payment return URLs.

environment.name: PAYMENT_PRODUCTS_FILE
environment.description: Path to the server-side payment product catalogue.

environment.name: PAYMENT_WEBHOOK_LEASE
environment.description: Time after which an interrupted webhook may be reclaimed.

environment.name: PAYMENT_WEBHOOK_RETENTION
environment.description: Retention time for successfully processed webhook payloads.

environment.name: STRIPE_TRIAL_DAYS
environment.description: Default Stripe subscription trial length in days.

environment.name: GOOGLE_PLAY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE
environment.description: Path to the Google Play service account JSON file.

environment.name: GOOGLE_PLAY_PUBSUB_AUDIENCE
environment.description: Expected audience of the authenticated Google Pub/Sub push endpoint.

environment.name: PAYMENT_DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY
environment.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte key used to encrypt Google purchase tokens at rest.

environment.name: APPLE_APP_STORE_CONFIG_FILE
environment.description: Path to the Apple App Store verification config.
